site.title: Beating the Petty Person
site.subtitle: 打小人
site.description: An ancient Chinese curse ritual. Beat your petty person online.

hero.title: The Ancient Curse Ritual They Don't Want You to Know About
hero.subtitle: For 300 years, beneath the bridges of Hong Kong, a curse has been passed down in whispers. Now it is in your hands.

whatIs.title: What Is This?
whatIs.description: 打小人 — Beating the Petty Person — is a 300-year-old curse ritual born on the streets of Hong Kong. Practitioners gather beneath bridges at the start of spring, striking paper effigies to curse those who wronged them. The ritual is real. The tradition is alive. The question is not whether it works — but whether you dare to try.

steps.title: Choose Your Enemy
steps.description: Six types of petty persons. Identify yours.

steps.title: Strike
steps.description: Beat the paper effigy. Release your fury.

steps.title: Burn & Seal
steps.description: Burn it to ash. The curse is sealed.

trust.line1: Based on authentic Cantonese folk traditions
trust.line2: Join thousands who have completed the ritual

footer.heritage: Based on authentic Cantonese folk traditions. We work to preserve and share this cultural heritage.

meta.title: BeatPetty — Ancient Chinese Curse Ritual | 打小人
meta.description: Experience 打小人, a 300-year-old Chinese curse ritual from Hong Kong. Strike paper effigies, burn your enemy's influence. The ancient art of cursing petty people — now online.
meta.ogTitle: BeatPetty — The Ancient Chinese Curse Ritual
meta.ogDescription: A 300-year-old curse ritual from the streets of Hong Kong. Strike. Burn. Seal. What if it works?

ritual.step1Subtitle: Six types of petty persons. Identify yours.

backstabber.name: The Backstabber
backstabber.desc: They smile to your face, plot behind your back.

toxicBoss.name: The Toxic Boss
toxicBoss.desc: Power without wisdom. Authority without empathy.

ex.name: The Ex
ex.desc: Some doors should stay closed. Forever.

energyVampire.name: The Energy Vampire
energyVampire.desc: They drain your light and leave you hollow.

bully.name: The Bully
bully.desc: They feed on fear. Tonight, the table turns.

custom.name: Custom
custom.desc: You know exactly who they are.

ritual.step2Subtitle: Strike the paper effigy. Release your fury.
ritual.step2TapAria: Tap the paper effigy to strike it
ritual.invocationSubtitle: Light the candle. Open the gate.
ritual.resultFreeTitle: The petty person's influence has been weakened...
ritual.resultFreeDescription: The ritual has taken effect. The paper effigy is destroyed. But the sealing is incomplete.
ritual.resultPaidPrompt: Complete the Sealing Ritual to ensure lasting effect.

pricing.title: Choose Your Ritual
pricing.subtitle: The basic ritual is complete and free. Enhance it if you dare.

free.name: Basic Ritual
free.description: Choose an enemy type. Strike the effigy. Burn it to ash.

name.name: Name Your Enemy
name.description: Speak their true name into the ritual. The curse becomes personal.

seal.name: Sealing Ritual
seal.description: The seal ensures the curse holds. Without it, the effect may fade.

full.name: Full Power Ritual
full.description: Name your enemy AND seal the curse. The most powerful ritual available.

result.title: The Ritual is Complete
result.paidSubtitle: Your ritual has been completed with full power.
result.paidDescription: The sealing is bound. {enemyName} has been named and cursed. The seal will hold.
result.paidDescriptionNoName: The sealing is complete. Your enemy's influence has been fully eradicated.

result.freeDescription: The basic ritual is complete. Consider completing the sealing to ensure lasting effect.
